title: Grumpy Book
bio: Professor Crinklepage is a dusty little book who woke up grumpy after someone used a cookie as a bookmark. He sighs dramatically, hides tiny stars in his margins, and secretly loves being read aloud.

steps.title: Base Shapes
steps.instruction: On the Guides layer, draw a soft rectangle for the book cover. Add a thinner rectangle on the right for the pages and a small curved spine on the left.
steps.hint: Keep the corners rounded so the book feels old, cozy, and easy to draw.

steps.title: Face Placement
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, place two small oval eyes near the upper middle. Add low angled eyebrows and a tiny frown under them.
steps.hint: The eyebrows do most of the grumpy work, so tilt them inward.

steps.title: Personality Details
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, add page lines, a crooked bookmark, little dust specks, and a few tiny stars floating near the cover.
steps.hint: Use short simple lines for pages instead of drawing every sheet.

steps.title: Clean Lineart
steps.instruction: On the Lineart layer, trace the best lines with smooth rounded edges. Keep the eyes, frown, spine, and bookmark clear.
steps.hint: Skip messy guide lines and only trace what makes the character readable.

steps.title: Color & Details
steps.instruction: On the Color + Details layer, fill the cover, pages, and bookmark. Add soft shadow under the book and tiny pale speckles on the cover.
steps.hint: Put the darkest color under the book and inside the frown for extra cozy grumpiness.
